faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Hollis, Queens?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Hollis typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of the hive, location accessibility, and extent of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Hollis property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout Hollis. Most bee removals are completed within 1-3 hours, though larger colonies or hard-to-reach nests may require additional time. We prioritize urgent situations where bees pose immediate safety risks.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we humanely relocate bee colonies rather than exterminating them, especially honeybees which are vital pollinators. Our technicians assess each situation and use the most appropriate removal method that balances safety concerns with environmental responsibility.
